title: quercus calophylla
intro: Quercus calophylla, also known as the California white oak, is a deciduous tree species native to the southwestern United States and northwestern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Quercus calophylla include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Quercus calophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues and skin problems.
